title: astragalus prostratus
intro: Astragalus prostratus, also known as prostrate milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus prostratus are said to include improving cardiovascular health, reducing stress and anxiety, and boosting the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
